rides_end_metadata_presence_chk.name: rides_end_metadata_presence_chk
rides_end_metadata_presence_chk.value: ("rides"."ended_at" IS NULL AND "rides"."ended_by_user_id" IS NULL AND "rides"."end_source" IS NULL AND "rides"."end_reason" IS NULL AND "rides"."auto_end_processed_at" IS NULL) OR ("rides"."ended_at" IS NOT NULL AND "rides"."end_source" IS NOT NULL)

rides_human_end_actor_chk.name: rides_human_end_actor_chk
rides_human_end_actor_chk.value: "rides"."end_source" IS NULL OR "rides"."end_source" = 'AUTO' OR "rides"."ended_by_user_id" IS NOT NULL

ride_stops_planned_time_order_chk.name: ride_stops_planned_time_order_chk
ride_stops_planned_time_order_chk.value: "ride_stops"."planned_arrival_at" IS NULL OR "ride_stops"."planned_departure_at" IS NULL OR "ride_stops"."planned_departure_at" >= "ride_stops"."planned_arrival_at"

conversations_context_present_chk.name: conversations_context_present_chk
conversations_context_present_chk.value: "conversations"."ride_id" IS NOT NULL OR "conversations"."booking_id" IS NOT NULL
